spec.description: [Chinese version] Updated on 2024.05.20, based on the ECS collected by TenSunS, it can match the display of ECS information fields collected in automatic synchronization to optimize the display of important indicators.Rebuilt using the new style of Grafana10, the concept of health scoring has been added, and some charts of overall resource consumption information have been added.Contains the overall resource display and resource detailed chart: CPU, memory, disk, IO network and other monitoring indicators.https://github.com/starsliao/TenSunS

spec.title: Network Socket connection information
spec.description:
Sockets_used-The total amount of all protocol sockets used 

CurrEstab-the number of TCP connections whose current status is ESTABLISHED or CLOSE-WAIT 

TCP_alloc-the number of TCP sockets allocated (established, applied to sk_buff) 

TCP_tw-the number of TCP connections waiting to be closed 

UDP_inuse-the number of UDP sockets in use 

RetransSegs-TCP replay Number of packets transmitted 

OutSegs-TCP Number of packets sent by 

InSegs-TCP Number of packets received by

properties.value: Total amount of all protocol sockets used

spec.legendFormat: The proportion of FD used by the process

matcher.options: The proportion of FD used by the process

spec.title: Time-consuming for each IO read and write (reference: less than 100ms)
spec.description:
Read time seconds The number of seconds spent on each disk partition read operation 

Write time seconds The number of seconds spent on each disk partition write operation 

IO time seconds The number of seconds spent on each disk partition input/output operation 

IO time weighted seconds The number of weighted seconds spent on each disk partition input/output operation

spec.title: Disk read and write rate (IOPS)
spec.description:
Reads completed: The number of reads completed per second for each disk partition 

Writes completed: the number of writes completed per second for each disk partition 

IO now The number of input/output requests being processed per second for each disk partition

spec.title: Disk read and write capacity per second
spec.description:
Read bytes The number of bits read per second per disk partition 
Written bytes The number of bits written per second per disk partition

spec.title: The proportion of I/O operation time spent every 1 second (I/O Util)
spec.description:
The time spent on I/O in every second of natural time.(Wall-clock time) 

node_disk_io_time_seconds_total: 
 The number of seconds the disk spends on input/output operations.This value is the cumulative value.(Milliseconds Spent Doing I/Os)

irate (node_disk_io_time_seconds_total[1m]): 
 calculates the rate per second: (last value-last previous value)/Timestamp difference, that is: the proportion of time the disk spends on I/O operations within 1 second.

matcher.options: Idle - Waiting for something to happen
sdb_% of I/O operations per second
The proportion of disk spent on I/O operations

spec.title: [$show_name]: Partition free space (EXT.*/XFS/NFS)
spec.description:
In this Kanban board: the total amount of disk, usage, available usage, and usage rate remain the same as the values of the Size, Used, Available, and Use% columns of the df command, and the value of Use% will be rounded to retain a decimal place, which will be more accurate.

 Note: The Use% algorithm in df is: (size-free) * 100 / (avail + (size-free)). If the result is divisible by, it is the value, and if it is not divisible by, it is the value + 1. The unit of the result is %.
 Refer to the source code of the df command:

spec.title: Overall total load and overall average CPU usage
Overall total memory and overall average memory usage
Overall total disk and overall average disk usage
Server resource overview table [group: $group, total number of hosts: $total]
spec.description:
Partition usage rate, disk read, disk write, download bandwidth, upload bandwidth, if there are multiple network cards or multiple partitions, it is the value of the network card or partition with the highest usage rate collected.

 Number of connections: CurrEstab-The number of TCP connections whose current status is ESTABLISHED or CLOSE-WAIT.

 health value is a new indicator. It is calculated based on CPU, memory, and IO. A value below 90 points indicates that the system's resource usage needs to be paid attention to. This is an indicator being tested, and the parameters may need to be optimized according to the actual situation.

spec.title: resource usage rate P99 in the last 7 days
spec.description:
- P99: The data sets are arranged in ascending order, with the largest data in the 99th point.(That is, the data in 99% of the positions in ascending order) 
-This table needs to add recording rules to Prometheus (refer to the Kanban download page) 
-The data will be released after 1 hour of collection 
-The time range [7d:1h] indicates that you want to view the hourly data points in the past 7 days.

spec.legendFormat: Waiting for IO to complete the blocked process

matcher.options: Waiting for IO to complete the blocked process

spec.title: Resource overview: currently selected host: $show_name, instance: $instance
Node Exporter Dashboard 20240520 TenSunS Automatic Synchronization Version

spec.description: The name field of the overview table supports filtering, and regular rules can be used, such as:.*aa.*bb.*
